name: recent_chats
desc: Retrieve recent conversation exchanges. Optionally filter by time range. Use to review what was discussed recently or during a specific period.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of results to return (1-20, default 5)

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Only return conversations before this ISO datetime (e.g. 2026-03-20T00:00:00Z)

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Only return conversations after this ISO datetime (e.g. 2026-03-01T00:00:00Z)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order: 'asc' (oldest first) or 'desc' (newest first, default)
